title: wolfhsm: cert.rs (feature=cert)
description: Implement wolfhsm/src/cert.rs gated on #[cfg(feature=cert)]. Wrap wh_Client_Cert*: init(client), add_trusted(client,id,access,cert), read_trusted(client,id)->Vec<u8>, erase_trusted(client,id), verify(client,cert), verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey(client,cert)->KeyId, verify_acert(client,cert). All return Result<_,Error>.
